content.en:
"The purpose of this operation is to invade the Strange Star Tower. "

Lord Longgu said.

"Invade the Trick Star Tower, and that's exactly what happened. "

Ye Tian had guessed before that the True Immortal Land was going to attack the Strange Star Tower, after all, what the Frostless Lord said was so obvious, he was not stupid, so he naturally guessed it, but he didn't dig deeper.

At this time, Lord Longgu continued: "The Strange Star Tower is not strong, there are only two Legendary Realm Lords, and the branch is the Strange Star Lord and the Star Lord. However, behind the Tricky Star Tower is a sub-alliance, the Ten Thousand Seas Alliance of the Infinite Sea. There are a total of twenty-one Legendary Realm Lords in the Ten Thousand Seas Alliance, compared to the entire Ten Thousand Gods Alliance, we are naturally not opponents, but this time a good news came, there was a contradiction within the Ten Thousand Gods Alliance, so it was impossible for the Ten Thousand Gods Alliance to unite. In addition, two new Legendary Realm Lords have been born in our True Immortal Land, so they are ready to launch an attack on the Strange Star Tower. Even if you can't kill the owner of the Trick Star Building, you have to let the Trick Star Mansion Lord lose one or two clones, severely damage the Trick Star Tower, and even destroy the Trick Star Tower. "

Then, Lord Longgu began to assign tasks.

There are many industries in the 08 Star Tower, so it must be comprehensively cracked down, and in addition, to prevent the support of some forces of the Wanhai Alliance, it is also necessary to send people to defend it.

The mission of the Legendary Realm Lord is to resist the Legendary Realm Lord of the Ten Thousand Seas Alliance, as well as to besiege and kill the Lord of the Strange Star.

This time, every Legendary Realm Lord of the True Immortal Holy Land sent at least one clone, and some of them sent all the clones except the main body.

It is conceivable that in terms of the number of bodies of the Legendary Realm Lords, this is almost a battle between dozens of Legendary Realm Lords.

Soon.

Ye Tian was also assigned a task.

"Attack the headquarters of the Strange Star Tower. "

This is Ye Tian's task.

At that time, the Legendary Realm Lords of the Strange Star Tower will be hunted down and killed by the Legendary Realm Lords of the True Infinite Holy Land, or pulled into the empty sea or the long river of time to fight and fight, and then there will be no Legendary Realm Lords in the headquarters of the Strange Star Tower, and the half-step Legendary Realm Lords of the True Infinite Holy Land will bring a large number of Transcendent Realm Lords to invade the headquarters of the Strange Star Tower.

And Ye Tian is one of the Transcendent Realm Lords.

Destroying the headquarters of the Strange Star Tower, killing many strong people in the Strange Star Tower, even if the two Legendary Realm Lords can get away with it, the Strange Star Tower will be destroyed.

"Lord Longgu, when are we going to do it?"

Lord Umon asked.

"Preventing news leaks, now.

Dragon Ancient Lord Dao.

......

The Tricky Star Tower, located on the Boundless Island of the Boundless Sea, is the territory of the Tricky Star Tower.

And wherever in the Infinite Sea, there are branches of the Trick Star Tower.

At this time.

The Lord of the Tricky Star is in retreat at the headquarters of the Tricky Star Tower.

Suddenly.

The long river of time surges, and there are legendary realms that attack and kill Shi through the long river of time

"Trick Star Tower, the big array!"

And the three lords opened the large array of the Strange Star Tower, and immediately their bodies moved, entered the long river of time, and collided with one hand with a blow.

Bang!!!

The river of time stopped for a moment, and then, a figure appeared in front of the Star Lord.

"There is really no holy land, Lord Baiheng. "

The Star Lord said coldly.

Although this is a new lord, the Baiheng Lord is almost invincible when he is in the half-step Legendary Realm, and even if he has just been promoted to the Legendary Realm Lord, his strength is not weaker than him in the slightest

Whoa!!

Another Legendary Realm Lord appeared, all of them were Legendary Realm Lords from the True Sacred Land.

Meanwhile.

The Star Lord's expression changed, and he found that his other clones were also being targeted.

As the lord of the Legendary Realm, he still has a lot of clones, a total of one ontology, three doppelgangers.

Now, all of them are being targeted.

And the same is true of the Star Lord, who is all stared at.

This is clearly not a temptation, but a real attack.

"Help!"

The Lord of the Trick Star immediately asked for help from the Ten Thousand Seas Alliance, saying that there was really no Holy Land to attack the Trick Star Tower.

As for how many Legendary Realm Lords came to help, he wasn't sure, but there were.

Otherwise, once the Strange Star Tower is destroyed, the strength of the Ten Thousand Seas Alliance will be weakened, and the other Legendary Realm Lords will probably not sit idly by and watch this happen.

"What are you really going to do without a holy place?"

The Star Lord panicked.

There's no way, surrounded by so many Legendary Realm Lords, he will definitely not be able to defeat him, and one will fall if he is not careful.

It's just that the doppelganger falls, and the ontology falls really falls.

And at this moment, his doppelganger is entangled, and his body is surrounded by so many Legendary Realm Lords, which is really dangerous

The fight has begun!

And the support of the Ten Thousand Seas Alliance was also very fast, and one by one the Legendary Realm Lords came to support, but due to internal contradictions, not all the Legendary Realm Lords came to support, which gave the True No Holy Land a chance.

The other side.

The headquarters of the Strange Star Tower was also attacked, and the half-step Legendary Realm lords such as Lord Wumeng led a large number of Transcendent Realm Lords to attack the headquarters of the Strange Star Tower.

The Legendary Lords have the Legendary Lord's battlefield, and these Legendary Lords have the Legendary Lord's battlefield.

Soon.

Ye Tian also faced a transcendent realm lord, the other party was just an ordinary transcendent realm lord, and as soon as he fought, he was directly crushed by Ye Tian.

A legendary-level Eternal Dao, a top-notch legendary skill, directly hit the transcendent realm lord without the power to resist, and was killed by Ye Tian within a few moves.

In the headquarters of the Strange Star Tower, many Legendary Lords are the main body, not the clone, because the main body is very safe in the Strange Star Tower, but this time it is dangerous, so many Legendary Lords have fallen, and a clone in the Infinite Sea and other Eternal Seas has fallen directly and died.

Ye Tian killed 140 legendary lords of the Strange Star Tower, and he entered here for only one purpose, that is, to find the Kuhai Gravel.

And the most likely place for the Star Tower to store the Kukai Gravel is either inside the Star Lord's Void Ball or in the treasure house.

And the treasure house of the Strange Star Building is not just one, but many.

So, it's not easy to find the empty sea gravel.

Abrupt.

Ye Tian noticed a Transcendent Realm Legendary Lord, who was escorted by several half-step Legendary Realm Lords, trying to break out of the encirclement.

And he noticed that the eternal treasure in the hand of the Transcendent Legendary Lord was a long sword, and the long sword exuded an incomparably powerful aura, as if it could tear through space at will and pierce into the empty sea.

On the tip of this Eternal Supreme Sword, Ye Tian sensed the breath of the sand and gravel of the empty sea.

"This guy's eternal treasure has melted into a grain of empty sea gravel, who is he from the Lord of the Stars?"

Ye Tian was surprised.

But soon, he learned the identity of this Legendary Lord of the Transcendent Realm through the other Legendary Lords of the True Void Holy Land.

He is a descendant of the Mysterious Star Lord and a descendant disciple, and he has the legendary invincible strength of the Transcendent Realm in the Mysterious Star Tower, and is called the Shattered Star Lord.

"It seems that I don't need to go to the treasure house of the Evil Star Tower, kill this Shattered Star Lord, and rob him of his Eternal Treasure, and I can get a grain of empty sea gravel. Ye Tian said darkly. _
